summary: Have an MLB account Log In - View password
description:
GIVEN the user launches the app without saved data
AND selects the [Have an MLB account?] button on the Startup screen

steps.action:
WHEN the Log In screen is displayed
AND the user enters a password in the "Password" field
AND the user selects the [eye] button
steps.result:
THEN the [eye] button no longer contains a slash through the eye icon
AND the user is able to see the password in the "Password" field
